# Jesús Corrius

> Head of Architecture and Software Engineer with 25+ years of experience in cloud computing, AI technologies, and software development. Expert in Python, C#, .NET Core, Google Cloud, Azure, and Kubernetes.

- Canonical page: https://jcorrius.github.io/
- Location: Palma, Balearic Islands, Spain
- Nationality: Spanish
- Languages: Catalan, Spanish, English

## Current role

Head of Architecture at Travelgate — architecting, designing, and implementing high-quality
software solutions, leading a team of architects, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and
evaluating emerging technologies such as AI.

## Core expertise

- Software architecture and system design
- Cloud computing (Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure, Kubernetes, DevOps)
- AI and machine learning technologies
- Software development (Python, C#, .NET Core)
- Quantitative finance
- Agile development

## Education

- Computer Science — Universitat Oberta de Catalunya (UOC)
- Audiovisual Communication — Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (UAB)
